summary: Comprehensive testing of Victory AI rebuild with Cal AI-style simplicity completed successfully. All major features including quiz funnel onboarding, fighter buddy creation, hard paywall, and unified Train tab are working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend API health check (13/13 tests passed - 100%)
Welcome page shows AI fighter buddy messaging
Signup form has Google OAuth and email/password options
Quiz page shows 5 questions with progress bar (1/5, 2/5 verified)
Fighter Buddy Creator allows creating buddy with name, weight class, stance, archetype
Paywall shows $2.99/month and $19.99/year plans with 'Start My Free Trial' CTA
Train page shows setup with round/rest duration, video recording toggle
Train page 'Start Training' button present and functional
Bottom nav has Home, Train (dumbbell icon), Timer, Library tabs
Protected routes working with session authentication
API endpoints functional: quiz/submit, fighter-buddy/archetypes, fighter-buddy/create, payments/checkout, subscription/status, ai/generate-feedback, training/start
